g.title: Estimating L2 distance between a query and a PQ-quantized database vector.

ul.li: Computation Complexity: O(D) multiply-adds per query vector is reduced to O(M) additions during search.
_mm256_gather_ps used to load distances from LUT using the $i_m$ indices.
_mm256_add_ps accumulates the values into a running sub-total.
Memory Alignment: LUT is typically aligned to 64-byte cache line boundaries (DDR4/DDR5 optimization).

div.p: Optimization: The LUT is small enough to reside in L1/L2 cache during the search phase, minimizing the impact of the gather instruction's memory latency.

g.text: PHASE 2: The Hot Loop (Once per Database Vector)

g.title: VPGATHERDD/VPGATHERQD: Fetches sparse data from memory into a SIMD register using vector indices.
Estimating L2 distance between a query and a PQ-quantized database vector.
VPGATHERDD/VPGATHERQD: Fetches sparse data from memory into a SIMD register using vector indices.
